ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "open_datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry (minute-by-minute) */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the period */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* Time frame of the data (e.g., 1 minute, 5 minutes, 1 hour) */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the period */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the instrument at the close of the period */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Calculated measure of the instrument's price volatility during the period */,
  "prev_close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the previous period for comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument (e.g., AAPL, USD/JPY) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., Stock, Currency, Commodity) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument entry was last updated */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument (e.g., Semiconductors, Banking) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the instrument's exchange */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last trade for the instrument */,
  "last_trade_price" REAL /* Price of the last trade for the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source entry was last updated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last successful data synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., Trading, Analytics, IT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access request in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data (e.g., news, economic indicator) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the external data */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the external data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external data */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the external data was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the external data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the external data entry was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the external data (e.g., political, economic, corporate) */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the external data to the financial markets (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the data on market movements (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the external data source for further reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_data_id")
)
